case_title: TAM, HERVE VS O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, HERVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS AMENDED TO CORRECT DEFENDANT'S NAME TO YVONNE DESY O.NEILL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY TAM, HERVE AS TO DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY HEARING SET FOR NOV-21-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-07 BY JPT QUEENA C. HO, CLERK-FRAYRAY, NOTHING ON RECORD. PARTIES PRESENT, NO EVIDENCE RETAINED.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY IS GRANTED. CLERK-BETH WILBER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAM, HERVE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT O'NEILL, YVONNE DESY $1,080.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, UPON SIGNING THE THIS SETTLEMENT ON NOV-21-07, YVONNE DESY O'NEIL MADE A CASH PAYMENT OF TOTALING $100.00 TO REDUCE THE BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT FROM $1080.00 TO $980.00. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $80.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-10-2008 AND ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
